sourcePaths: Hall County Archive Center > Building Inspections Issued Permits > RESIDENTIAL (ADID=1413)
evidenceFreshness: Hall County issued-permit PDFs dated 2026-06-24 covering permits issued 2026-06-10 through 2026-06-24.

adapterFeasibility.why: CivicPlus Archive Center provides direct PDFs by item id. Residential PDF text extraction with pypdf yielded structured blocks: Record No, Parcel No, Issued Date, Site Address, Description, Type, Contact, Contractor. Current PDF already exposes contractor/contact names, unlike Forsyth public ArcGIS layer.
adapterFeasibility.fastestAdapterPath: GET https://www.hallcounty.org/Archive.aspx?AMID=39, scrape category links for RESIDENTIAL/COMMERCIAL/OCCUPANCY ADID->ViewFile item ids, download PDFs, extract text, split on 'Record No:', retain Type='Single Family Residence' or description containing new SFR/townhome, normalize Contractor/Contact company names, group to builder_signals.json and builder_validation_queue.csv.
adapterFeasibility.knownParserNotes: PDF has typo label 'Decription:' and sometimes contractor appears only in Contact. Exclude homeowner, manufactured home, demo-only, additions/remodels, trades, pools, roofs, retaining walls unless used as weak supplemental contractor evidence. Commercial PDF has townhome shell permits that can corroborate production builders.

blockers: Only one current Hall residential PDF was downloaded in the sprint, so candidate depth is strongest for 2026-06-10 through 2026-06-24 and should be backfilled from prior Archive Center items if exposed in page history/search.

Some public websites block automated fetches (ResiBuilt 403; Sims Custom Homes 406), so website/contact fields are left blank unless directly verified by successful fetch or obvious official domain plus permit evidence.
Hall PDFs do not provide direct acquisition land contacts; every candidate remains needs-call-confirmation.
fastestNextAction: Build hall-ga PDF adapter first, because it already produces contractor-bearing permit evidence. Backfill 90-180 days of Residential + Commercial PDFs, then call/validate only candidates with repeated new SFR/townhome permits and official website/contact page.
